title: Senior Financial Analyst - Kotak Mahindra Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Kotak Mahindra Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
